summary: TemaDom Pre-Launch Full Test Iteration 83 - ALL TESTS PASSING. Backend 24/24 endpoints tested successfully. Frontend comprehensive verification complete with desktop/mobile, light/dark modes.

issues: Minor: 'Регистрация' button has white text styling in light mode but is on gold button so still readable

seed_data_creation: New test user registered during backend auth tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was a comprehensive pre-launch test. All backend APIs pass. All frontend pages accessible. Mobile logo 86px confirmed. Desktop navbar has no centered logo or hamburger (correct). Theme toggle works. Subscription plans show correct EUR pricing (15/35/75). AI Designer requires auth (expected). Room tabs navigate correctly. FAQ has 6 items. Footer has NO footer_desc text. Light mode text is readable.

backend_endpoints.subscriptions_plans: GET /api/subscriptions/plans - OK (БАЗОВ 15 EUR, ПРО 35 EUR, PREMIUM 75 EUR)

frontend_pages.landing: Loads with hero section, BEFORE/AFTER images, gold CTA button
frontend_pages.navbar_desktop: No logo in center, no hamburger, theme toggle on left, all nav items visible
frontend_pages.navbar_mobile: Logo 86px centered, hamburger visible, theme toggle present
frontend_pages.mobile_menu: 'Начало' shown in menu (4th item after live stats bar items)
frontend_pages.light_mode: All text readable on light background
frontend_pages.ai_designer_page: Auth gate working, no '3 снимки' text
frontend_pages.ai_sketch_page: Auth gate working, readable text in both themes
frontend_pages.subscriptions_page: All 3 company plans displayed with EUR prices

verified_features.theme_toggle: Switches between dark and light mode correctly
